meaning: National Physical Laboratory (英国)国家物理实验所
examples: The NPL formation rate was slower than people thought.
NPL sales used shipping containers at Chinese main ports.
This is the largest NPL sold to foreign capital in that province.
The NPL ratio, the size of bad loans against total lending, fell to 0.9% from 1% in December.
The China Banking Regulatory Commission announced that the NPL ratio for all banks at the end of September was 0.9%.
